title: Enchanting Table Language Translator
description: This texture pack translates enchanting table language (standard galactic alphabet) into English.
body:
### DESCRIPTION
 
This resource pack will translate the enchanting table language (standard galactic alphabet) into English.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f10c489108478979a3b1cbb2c9fe7f34c5ef295.png)

### INSTALLATION GUIDE 

Go to pause menu > options > resource packs and click open pack folder. copy the zip to this folder, then go back to Minecraft and move the pack from available (left) to selected (right).

### OTHER THINGS TO NOTE

- The translated text will not actually tell you what enchantment you would get. They are random gibberish phrases that are formed by picking out words randomly from this list:


<details>
<summary>List of random words used to form gibberish in the enchantment table</summary>

1. the  
2. elder  
3. scrolls  
4. klaatu  
5. berata  
6. niktu  
7. xyzzy  
8. bless  
9. curse  
10. light  
11. darkness  
12. fire  
13. air  
14. earth  
15. water  
16. hot  
17. dry  
18. cold  
19. wet  
20. ignite  
21. snuff  
22. embiggen  
23. twist  
24. shorten  
25. stretch  
26. fiddle  
27. destroy  
28. imbue  
29. galvanize  
30. enchant  
31. free  
32. limited  
33. range  
34. of  
35. towards  
36. inside  
37. sphere  
38. cube  
39. self  
40. other  
41. ball  
42. mental  
43. physical  
44. grow  
45. shrink  
46. demon  
47. elemental  
48. spirit  
49. animal  
50. creature  
51. beast  
52. humanoid  
53. undead  
54. fresh  
55. stale  
56. phnglui  
57. mglwnafh  
58. cthulhu  
59. rlyeh  
60. wgahnagl  
61. fhtagn  
62. baguette  


</details>


- for feedback, bug reports, or other help, join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/kk3j3ct6xk) from the links section of this page!
